spec_match.rationale: Superb compliance. Directly targets the logical property mapping contracts where inline-size dynamically adapts to physical height in vertical modes and start alignment in RTL contexts natively.

interactive.rationale: Features an interactive content text-input and range slider controlling inline-size caps simultaneously across all three writing directions.

edge_cases.rationale: Measures width/height correctly depending on the target axis, reporting 'tall' vs 'wide' after paint loops.

references.rationale: Correct CSS logical specifications and MDN links.

design_system.rationale: Very elegant. High-contrast grids, informative mapping tables, and clean CSS variables.

summary: A gorgeous interactive demonstration verifying that fit-content mappings on inline-size behave direction-aware across LTR, RTL, and Vertical-RL contexts.
